Compliance.description: CMS reg #1140, FSP 51381, AA GCR stable rating; some legacy non-compliance (capitation, assets) but operational and solvent.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.4-2.5 TrustIndex (low), mixed app reviews; some positive testimonials but overall poor.

Product Value.description: 10 plans for various needs, competitive pricing, enhanced limits, network discounts; good value but low satisfaction.

Innovation.description: Member app (claims/card/auth), virtual GP, WhatsApp channel, CGM/mammograms prevention, SmartCare, Hospital-at-Home.

Customer Support.description: 0860 helpline, WhatsApp, email, app; developer responses to app reviews; complaints on resolution speed.

Accessibility & Security.description: App and web portal available, virtual care access; POPIA assumed compliant; no breaches found.

socialSentiment.summary: Low HelloPeter; mixed app; innovation praised by healthcare community but service fails customers.
